summary: Iteration 5 testing — weekly admin report endpoints + decision-emails on PATCH + i18n cleanup of haarniskat/armour/rustningar. Backend: 79/79 pytest pass (66 prior + 13 new in test_iteration5_weekly_and_decision_emails.py). Both new admin endpoints work, return correct shapes, enforce admin auth, and PATCH responds in <2s with non-blocking BackgroundTask. APScheduler logs confirm BOTH jobs registered: monthly_digest (1st@09:00) + weekly_admin_report (Mon@09:00) Europe/Helsinki. Frontend: had to fix one trivial syntax garbage at end of i18n.js (frontend was failing to compile due to leftover stray characters in lines 661-666). After fix, AdminDashboard renders WeeklyReportPanel below NewsletterPanel correctly (y=391 vs y=209), preview button click loads inline weekly report HTML (Viikkokatsaus/Odottaa/Tilaajat all present). Sword page i18n: FI clean (no 'haarniskat'), SV clean (no 'rustningar'), but EN still contains 'armour' in p3 — i18n.js EN sword.p3 says 'viking swords, shields and armour'. Also FI translations for new admin.weekly_* keys are missing (only EN+SV have them) — UI shows raw keys 'admin.weekly_title', 'admin.weekly_sub', 'admin.weekly_preview', 'admin.weekly_send_now' when language=FI.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing FI keys admin.weekly_title / weekly_sub / weekly_preview / weekly_send_now / weekly_confirm in i18n.js. UI shows raw keys when lang=fi (default). EN and SV blocks have them.
sword.p3 in EN still contains the word 'armour' ('Period weapons — viking swords, shields and armour'). Iteration 5 explicitly required removing armour/armor from EN.

action_items: Add FI translations for admin.weekly_title, admin.weekly_sub, admin.weekly_preview, admin.weekly_send_now, admin.weekly_confirm in /app/frontend/src/lib/i18n.js TRANSLATIONS.fi.admin block.
Remove the word 'armour' from EN sword.p3 in i18n.js (e.g., change 'viking swords, shields and armour' to 'viking swords and shields').
critical_code_review_comments: FRONTEND COMPILATION WAS BROKEN ON ARRIVAL: i18n.js had stray duplicated/garbage tokens after the last function. Frontend webpack reported 'Parsing error: Unexpected token (662:0)'. Fixed.
FI i18n missing weekly_* keys is a clear oversight — main agent added them only to EN and SV. Default language is FI so admins see raw keys.
EN sword.p3 still contains 'armour' — iteration 5 spec required removing it. The FI and SV equivalents were correctly cleaned. Probably overlooked because the EN sentence rewrite wasn't done.

Backend: PATCH /api/admin/events/{id} correctly takes BackgroundTasks as a FastAPI parameter, schedules notify_submitter_decision after the response — measured PATCH latency well under 500ms in tests.
Backend: notify_submitter_decision short-circuits when organizer_email is missing, returning {sent:false, reason:'no_organizer_email'} — no exception raised.
Backend: send_weekly_admin_report aggregates pending/approved/rejected/subscribers + new_subs (last 7d) and renders a card-style HTML email; preview endpoint matches send endpoint logic exactly.
APScheduler: both jobs (monthly_digest & weekly_admin_report) registered at startup with replace_existing=True — confirmed in supervisor backend logs.
i18n.js is now ~615 lines but has 3 hardcoded TRANSLATIONS dicts; consider splitting per-language files (>700 lines threshold approaching).
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/lib/i18n.js (removed trailing garbage tokens at lines 661-666 to allow frontend to compile)

success_rate.frontend: 60% (panel renders + preview works + FI/SV i18n clean; EN i18n has armour, FI weekly_* keys missing)

seed_data_creation: TEST_iter5_* events created and cleaned up within tests (DELETE called at end of each PATCH test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: After E1 adds FI weekly_* keys and removes 'armour' from EN sword.p3, retest by visiting /admin (login as admin) and confirming the weekly panel shows real text not raw keys, then visit /swordfighting with localStorage.vk_lang='en' and confirm 'armour'/'armor' no longer appears. Backend tests are stable — re-run via: cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/. Public frontend URL: https://events-refresh-1.preview.emergentagent.com (note: NOT the same host as backend REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://events-refresh-1.preview.emergentagent.com — both happen to be the same domain but routes /api go to backend port 8001 via ingress).
rca of the issue: TWO issues found by testing: (1) i18n.js compilation: trailing garbage tokens (lines 661-666) — likely from a botched search/replace edit on pickLocalized helper. Symptom: 'Parsing error: Unexpected token (662:0)', frontend not compiling. Fix applied. (2) Incomplete iter-5 i18n changes: FI admin block in TRANSLATIONS object missing weekly_title/weekly_sub/weekly_preview/weekly_send_now/weekly_confirm keys (EN/SV have them); EN sword.p3 still mentions 'armour' (FI/SV cleaned). REPRODUCTION: Login to /admin in default FI lang -> WeeklyReportPanel shows literal 'admin.weekly_title' etc. Switch lang to EN, visit /swordfighting -> third paragraph 'Period weapons — viking swords, shields and armour'. MITIGATION: E1 to add the 5 FI keys + drop 'armour' from EN sword.p3.
